2604.08426.title: KV Cache Offloading for Context-Intensive Tasks
2604.08426.paper_summary: With the growing demand for long-context LLMs across a wide range of applications, the key-value (KV) cache has become a critical bottleneck for both latency and memory usage. Recently, KV-cache offloading has emerged as a promising approach to reduce memory footprint and inference latency while preserving accuracy. Prior evaluations have largely focused on tasks that do not require extracting large amounts of information from the context. In this work, we study KV-cache offloading on context-intensive tasks: problems where the solution requires looking up a lot of information from the input prompt. We create and release the Text2JSON benchmark, a highly context-intensive task that requires extracting structured knowledge from raw text. We evaluate modern KV offloading on Text2JSON and other context-intensive tasks and find significant performance degradation on both Llama 3 and Qwen 3 models. Our analysis identifies two key reasons for poor accuracy: low-rank projection of keys and unreliable landmarks, and proposes a simpler alternative strategy that significantly improves accuracy across multiple LLM families and benchmarks. These findings highlight the need for a comprehensive and rigorous evaluation of long-context compression techniques.
2604.08426.paper_summary_zh: 隨著對長上下文 LLM 的需求在各種應用中不斷增長，關鍵-值 (KV) 快取已成為延遲和記憶體使用的關鍵瓶頸。最近，KV 快取卸載作為一種有前景的方法出現，旨在減少記憶體佔用和推斷延遲，同時保持準確性。先前的評估主要集中在不需要從上下文中提取大量信息的任務上。在本研究中，我們研究了在上下文密集型任務上進行 KV 快取卸載：這些問題的解決方案需要從輸入提示中查找大量信息。我們創建並發布了 Text2JSON 基準測試，這是一個高度上下文密集型的任務，需要從原始文本中提取結構化知識。我們對 Text2JSON 和其他上下文密集型任務評估了現代 KV 卸載，發現 Llama 3 和 Qwen 3 模型的性能顯著下降。我們的分析確定了準確性差的兩個主要原因：鍵的低秩投影和不可靠的標記，並提出了一種更簡單的替代策略，顯著提高了多個 LLM 家族和基準的準確性。這些發現突顯了對長上下文壓縮技術進行全面和嚴格評估的必要性。
2604.08426.author: Andrey Bocharnikov et.al.
2604.08426.authors: Andrey Bocharnikov, Ivan Ermakov, Denis Kuznedelev, Vyacheslav Zhdanovskiy, Yegor Yershov
